name: The Kymin via Garth Wood
highlights: Longer, wilder version of the classic Kymin walk via Garth Wood.
points_of_interest: Naval Temple (1800); Round House Pavilion (NT); Kymin triangulation pillar
viewpoints: Wye Valley; Monmouth town laid out below; Black Mountains on a clear day
parking_start: Monmouth town (Glendower St) or NT Kymin car park
food_drink_nearby: Punch House; Gilpin's Coffee; Stonemill Rockfield; Savoy Theatre cafe
hazards_notes: Very narrow road up to Kymin car park
